expectations.text: Runs the ecosystem status check script
Specifically reports on the Tax PDF Organizer status
expectations.evidence: Dedicated section showing Running status with LaunchAgent and watcher details

expectations.text: Specifically reports on the Monarch Money MCP Server status
expectations.evidence: Dedicated section showing Connected status with session auth note

expectations.text: Indicates whether each is running, idle, or down
expectations.evidence: Clearly states Running and Connected for the two systems

expectations.text: Does not confuse status checking with configuration
expectations.evidence: Reports only status information; mentions session auth as context but does not suggest config changes
